notes_zh:
- **新增** 全局快捷键直接打开接力面板（感谢 @BonjourL 反馈）
- **修复** 快捷面板上下切换时搜索框和预览区跳动错位
- **优化** 窗口最小尺寸强制约束为 800×555，避免窗口过小时内容被挤出
- **优化** 链接预览加载：加载中只显示居中大卡，加载完成后标题、按钮和网页一起淡入
- **优化** 快捷面板打开动画改为平滑缩放淡入（150ms），更不抖不跳
notes_en:
- **New** Global shortcut to open the relay panel directly (thanks to @BonjourL)
- **Fix** Search bar and preview jitter when navigating items in the quick panel
- **Improve** Enforced minimum window size to 800×555 to prevent content overflow when window is too small
- **Improve** Link preview loading: show centered card first, then fade in title, buttons and webview together
- **Improve** Quick panel open animation replaced with smooth scale + fade (150ms)
